name: Armenian Nutmeg Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar and sifted flour, baking powder, and salt in a large bowl.
2. Rub the butter into the dry ingredients until the mixture resembles fine breadcrumbs.
3. Press half of the mixture into a well-greased 20cm square pan.
4. Dissolve baking soda in milk, then add egg and nutmeg to the mixture.
5. Pour the liquid mixture over the remaining sugar and flour mixture.
6. Mix everything together gently until combined.
7. Spoon the batter evenly over the top of the pressed-in mixture in the pan.
8. Sprinkle walnuts over the top of the cake.
9. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for 1 hour.
10. Allow the cake to stand for 15 minutes before turning it out onto a wire rack to cool.
